content.body:
Runs git log with a configurable depth (default 200). Parses
conventional commits: feat/refactor → decision, fix/chore → learning.
Scope from the commit message becomes a tag. Drafts carry INFERRED
confidence and CommitSHA in provenance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(cartographer): add CommitLogExtractor with tests
